caption: A man with a shaved head and a beard is recorded in a studio setting against a dark gray, horizontally ribbed acoustic foam wall. He wears a white t-shirt and black over-ear headphones. A silver professional microphone, mounted on a black boom arm, is positioned closely in front of his face; the text "rode NT1-A" is visible on the microphone's mounting hardware. Throughout the sequence, the man speaks into the microphone, his mouth opening and closing. He gestures with his hands, which move in and out of the frame, creating motion blur as he speaks. His facial expression remains focused, and his head shifts slightly from side to side as he communicates. The lighting is consistent across the scene, highlighting the man's features and the metallic surface of the microphone.
